series_metadata.series_description: These files contain materials related to the continuing education requirements of pawnbrokers licensed under Chapter 4727 of the Ohio Revised Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain original paper files in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for four (4) years after the end of the renewal period in which the material was submitted., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
